---
title: "The Information"
page-layout: article
---

# The Information

## Description

Technology business news source with reporting on companies, startups, platforms, venture capital, and digital markets. Supports research on technology industries and strategy.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, News & Media, Technology & Innovation
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address. Please note: The Information Pro content is not included with academic or university subscriptions.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-theinformation)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
